title: Preparation of 1x DNase buffer instruction
author: Emilyn, Costa Conceicao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains the laboratory protocol used to prepare  1× DNase buffer  for DNA processing in molecular biology workflows. The protocol describes the preparation of a  10× DNase buffer stock solution (100 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 25 mM MgCl₂, 5 mM CaCl₂)  and its dilution to obtain the  1× working solution . Detailed instructions are provided for preparing the required stock reagents, calculating molarity, and performing sterile preparation using filtration or autoclaving. 
 This protocol was used during laboratory procedures associated with DNA preparation and downstream sequencing applications in the accompanying study. The document is shared to support  methodological transparency and reproducibility  and corresponds to the manuscript " Evaluation of DNA   extraction methods for clinical Mycobacterium tuberculosis primary liquid culture for whole-genome sequencing".
